text:
In the first scene, I feel a sense of anticipation and slight disorientation—the orderly modern space invites reflection, yet the angle of my vision reminds me of impermanence and flux. The beanbags and open area propose comfort, but the visible emergency equipment hints at preparedness for the unforeseen.

In the second scene, curiosity arises. Bright colors and bold letters on the wall, with words about research, connection, and intelligence, spur me to ponder humanity’s relationship with technology. Screens display streams of information, blending the physical and digital, inviting me to think about how knowledge is constructed and shared. Here, I sense collective aspiration—a striving to understand, innovate, and coexist. I feel engaged, eager to explore more.
